title: tarenna alpestris
intro: Tarenna alpestris, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a shrub native to the Himalayan region. The medicinal properties of Tarenna alpestris lie in its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for various infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Tarenna alpestris is often prepared into a decoction or a tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
